groundstation.dataflowendpointgroup.CfnA:
Creates a Dataflow Endpoint Group request.

 Dataflow endpoint groups contain a list of endpoints. When the name of a dataflow endpoint group is specified in a mission profile, the Ground Station service will connect to the endpoints and flow data during a contact. 

 For more information about dataflow endpoint groups, see [Dataflow Endpoint Groups](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/ground-station/latest/ug/dataflowendpointgroups.html).

groundstation.dataflowendpointgroup.Cont.Description: Amount of time, in seconds, after a contact ends that the Ground Station Dataflow Endpoint Group will be in a `POSTPASS` state. A Ground Station Dataflow Endpoint Group State Change event will be emitted when the Dataflow Endpoint Group enters and exits the `POSTPASS` state.

Amount of time, in seconds, before a contact starts that the Ground Station Dataflow Endpoint Group will be in a `PREPASS` state. A Ground Station Dataflow Endpoint Group State Change event will be emitted when the Dataflow Endpoint Group enters and exits the `PREPASS` state.

groundstation.dataflowendpointgroup.Endp.Description: List of Endpoint Details, containing address and port for each endpoint.
